rows.label: tlk44300083_03_msg0001
rows.name:
I'll protect her no matter what!
I won't let anyone hurt her!

rows.label: tlk44300083_03_msg0002
rows.name:
I've realized it now.
I truly love her.

rows.label: tlk44300083_03_msg0003
rows.name:
If anyone harms her,
I won't forgive them,
king or god alike!
